episode_summary: James Harkin, Dan Schreiber and Andrew Hunter Murray host a Little Fish, reading listener-submitted mini-facts about Silver Lake’s namesake, hippo body fat vs Usain Bolt, Eminem measured in M&M’s, and the British Army’s 137% commitments, then riffing into space espresso, transmissible dog tumors, wartime bridges, and more.

facts.fact: And it's named after the Silver Lake Reservoir nearby. And it is named not after the Silver cover of its water, but after Herman Silver.
I discovered that the hippopotamus has the same body fat percentage at Usain Bolt at his absolute peak.
I have figured out that Eminem is exactly 138.4 Eminem's tall.
In 2024, the British Army was so busy that 137% of its personnel were committed to operations or exercise.
